title: Taco's Dark Theme
description: A dark themed texture pack for crystal PvP
body:
A dark themed texutre pack meant for crystal PvP, especially on anarchy servers like 2b2t. The pack is meant to improve your PvP experience whithout straying too far from the vanilla feel.

Currently, changes have been made to the following textures:

- Ender Pearls
- End Crystals
- Totems
- XP bottles
- Bedrock
- Obsidian
- Crying obsidian
- Golden apples

To use, simply put the ZIP file into your resource packs folder and load it from the resource packs menu in-game.
